heading: Duties of Deputy Director
label: 606 Duties of Deputy Director
text: The Deputy Director shall perform the duties assigned to him by the Director, and shall act as Director during the absence or incapacity of the Director or when the Director’s office is vacant.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 444 (, as added , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 302Aug. 7, 1939, ch. 501, § 153 Stat. 1223This section contains provisions as to duties of Assistant Director in , U.S.C., 1940 ed. The remainder of said section 444 is incorporated in sections 601, 603 and 608 of this title.section 444 of title 28
Amendments1959— substituted “Deputy Director” for “Assistant Director”.Pub. L. 86–370
Effective Date of 1959 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see .Pub. L. 86–370section 7(a) of Pub. L. 86–370Sept. 23, 1959
